name: matcha
description: Engineering philosophy ruleset — simple, efficient, deliberate. Enforces 5W1H thinking, stack audits, mid-task efficiency checks, and cleanup protocols.
author: plumpslabs

commands.name: matcha:review
commands.description: Review current implementation for efficiency and redundancy

commands.name: matcha:audit
commands.description: Audit existing stack for overlaps and inefficiencies

commands.name: matcha:why
commands.description: Run 5W1H check on the current task

commands.name: matcha:intensity
commands.description: Set matcha intensity: observe, enforce, or audit
